personal.name: Shivani Singh
personal.title: Full Stack Developer and AI Enthusiast
personal.about: A passionate and driven B.Tech student specializing in Computer Science and Engineering at LPU. With a solid foundation in C++, Java, and Python, I am dedicated to creating innovative, secure, and efficient solutions at the intersection of web development and AI.

experience.description: Developed core modules for an aptitude platform supporting 500+ questions and 100+ test cases. Engineered backend evaluation logic reducing manual checking effort by ~70% with automated scoring.

projects.title: BloomCare - Smart Healthcare Portal
projects.description: Built a secure healthcare platform managing 1,000+ patient records with encrypted storage. Developed multi-role ecosystem for patients, doctors, labs, hospitals with RBAC. Integrated CURA chatbot resolving 100+ healthcare queries. Enabled location-based service discovery via 4 REST APIs.

projects.title: EG-Marketplace - Multi-Vendor System
projects.description: Created a multi-tenant marketplace supporting Admin, Vendor, and Buyer roles. Designed vendor onboarding and financial workflows handling 100+ products. Implemented real-time notifications and optimized analytics dashboards. Achieved ~40% improvement in user engagement through performance tuning.

projects.title: Interactive Webpage - Electricity Usage
projects.description: Designed a responsive page focused on sustainability and electricity usage. Focused on visual data representation and user engagement for energy conservation.

faqs.question: What are your core strengths?
faqs.answer: My core strengths lie in full-stack web development, particularly with React and Node.js, and I have a strong foundation in Data Structures and Algorithms with over 150+ problems solved on LeetCode.

faqs.question: Are you open to internships?
faqs.answer: Yes, I am always looking for exciting opportunities to learn and grow in the field of software development and AI.

faqs.question: How can I contact you?
faqs.answer: You can reach out to me via the 'Contact' section in the portfolio or connect with me on LinkedIn.
